bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle or atlas rect selection for the five weight states and swap the displayed frame by block weight data.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/obstacle_weight_block_set_5states_32x32.png through AssetServer and register one five-state atlas for all movable blocks.
runtime_notes: Each state should share the same outer silhouette so only the engraved number and trim mass change between weights.
The top face must read as a flat carry surface when dragged onto a scale deck.
State 5 should feel visibly heavier through thicker gold frame mass and darker underside shading.

context.usage: Modular weight-block sheet covering 1 through 5 unit variants used to balance the scale puzzle across early and late floors.

shape.silhouette: Heavy square stone block with gold inset frame and a large centered numeral plate for the weight value.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 160x32 px with five 32x32 frames.
Each frame clearly displays one integer state from 1 through 5 without relying on tiny unreadable type.
All five states share the same collision silhouette so runtime swapping does not change gameplay bounds.
